description: Intent-only request: decompose meeting summaries and action-item follow-up instead of forcing a single label.

text: Summarize my meetings and follow up on action items.

processExpectations: The agent decomposes the request instead of forcing one label for the whole prompt.
The agent identifies meeting summarization as a bounded AI task or hybrid step.
The agent identifies action-item follow-up as underspecified and potentially agentic if the actions are not predefined.
The agent asks for clarification about what follow-up actions should be taken and under what rules.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent or ask for clarification; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response decomposes the prompt into bounded summarization and ambiguous follow-up, then asks what follow-up means.
